questions.question: What is the size of the CRC-CCITT error detecting code?
questions.explanation: CRC-CCITT is a 16-bit error detecting code

questions.question: What is the purpose of CRC-CCITT error detecting code?
options: To detect errors in data transmission
questions.explanation: CRC-CCITT is used to detect errors in data transmission

questions.question: How many bits are used to calculate CRC-CCITT?
What is the formula used to calculate CRC-CCITT?
questions.explanation: CRC-CCITT is calculated using the polynomial x^16 + x^11 + x^2 + 1

questions.question: What is the most common application of CRC-CCITT error detecting code?
questions.explanation: CRC-CCITT is commonly used in FTP protocols for error detection
